videoTitle: Khan Sir on India’s Reality, Government, Education System, Politics & Poverty | FO497 Raj Shamani

clips.title: India’s DEADLY Geopolitical Mistake 🇮🇳
clips.description: Khan Sir explains the massive strategic error India is making on the global stage regarding its neighbors and superpower relations.
clips.viral_reason: Geopolitics is a massive trend for Gen Z right now. Khan Sir’s blunt take on India's 'mistakes' triggers high engagement and debate in the comments.
clips.hook: India ki sabse badi geopolitical galti pata hai kya hai?
clips.caption: India is playing it safe, but at what cost? 🌏😱 Khan Sir exposes the truth. #India #Geopolitics #KhanSir

clips.title: AI Will Make You UNEMPLOYED 🤖❌
clips.description: A brutal reality check on how AI and privatization are going to wipe out traditional jobs and why the youth are not ready.
clips.viral_reason: Fear of AI job loss is a universal pain point. Khan Sir’s 'hard truth' style makes this terrifying reality highly shareable.
clips.hook: AI aapki naukri nahi khayega, AI chalane wala aapki naukri kha jayega.
clips.caption: Are you ready for the AI takeover? 📉 Khan Sir drops a reality bomb. #AI #Jobs #Future #KhanSir

clips.title: Medical System is a SCAM? 🏥💔
clips.description: Khan Sir explains why he provides low-cost treatment and how the current medical system destroys poor families financially.
clips.viral_reason: Calling out corporate greed in healthcare resonates with everyone. It’s emotionally charged and controversial.
clips.hook: Ek garib aadmi jab bimar padta hai na, toh wo akela nahi marta, uska pura khandan karze mein mar jata hai.
clips.caption: The brutal reality of Indian Healthcare. 💉💸 This will make you think twice. #Healthcare #India #KhanSir #Truth

clips.title: Khan Sir vs. Coaching MAFIA ✍️🔥
clips.description: Khan Sir takes a direct shot at NEET/JEE coaching centers charging lakhs of rupees and explains his 'war' against them.
clips.viral_reason: Direct 'beef' or conflict with a major industry (Coaching Mafia) always goes viral. Students will flock to support him.
clips.hook: Ye coaching wale bacho ko loot rahe hain ya padha rahe hain?
clips.caption: Khan Sir vs The Coaching Mafia! 👊 Education shouldn’t cost a fortune. #NEET #JEE #Education #KhanSir

clips.title: Why Bihar NEVER Changes 🗳️🚫
clips.description: A savage breakdown of the Bihar election system and why people vote for caste instead of progress.
clips.viral_reason: Political commentary on Bihar is always polarizing. Khan Sir calling out the voters' mindset is peak 'Hard Truths' content.
clips.hook: Bihar mein vikas pe vote nahi girta, wahan jaat pe vote girta hai.
clips.caption: Why is Bihar still lagging? 🧐 The uncomfortable truth about our voting system. #Bihar #Politics #Election #KhanSir

clips.title: The Business of RELIGIOUS HATE 🚩☪️
clips.description: Khan Sir addresses why religious hatred is being spread and who actually benefits from it (and it's not the common man).
clips.viral_reason: Extremely high spice level. Religion is the most controversial topic in India. This will generate massive comments and shares.
clips.hook: Dharm ke naam par ladne wale kabhi upar nahi jate, unhe niche hi rakha jata hai.
clips.caption: Who benefits from religious hate? 🤐 Khan Sir exposes the dark reality. #Religion #India #Unity #KhanSir

clips.title: India Will NEVER Beat Poverty? 📉📉
clips.description: A deep dive into why the poverty cycle continues in India despite 75+ years of independence.
clips.viral_reason: Brutal honesty about the 'system' keeping people poor. It challenges the government and societal norms.
clips.hook: Garibi ek aisi bimari hai jiska ilaaj aaj tak koi sarkar nahi kar payi.
clips.caption: Can India ever be poverty-free? 🇮🇳 The answer is darker than you think. #Poverty #Economy #India #KhanSir

clips.title: Rich Indians are SELFISH? 🤑✈️
clips.description: Khan Sir calls out wealthy Indians who make money in India but invest it abroad or leave the country.
clips.viral_reason: Calling out the elite/rich always works with Gen Z. It taps into the 'Eat the Rich' sentiment and nationalistic pride.
clips.hook: Amir log India se paisa kamate hain, lekin invest London aur America mein karte hain.
clips.caption: Why are the rich leaving India? 🛫🇮🇳 Khan Sir speaks facts! #Rich #BrainDrain #India #KhanSir

clips.title: Our Education System Makes SLAVES ⛓️🏫
clips.description: Khan Sir argues that the Indian education system is designed to create 'servants' rather than 'leaders' or 'entrepreneurs'.
clips.viral_reason: Every student feels this frustration. This clip will be used in thousands of 'Sigma' edits.
clips.hook: Hamara education system humein naukar banana sikhata hai, malik nahi.
clips.caption: The Education System is BROKEN. ❌🏫 Time to wake up! #Education #Student #Success #KhanSir
